- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions (none needed)
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task (not required for this project)
- [x] Launch the Project (not launched; awaiting user request)
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

Execution Guidelines
- Use available todo tools to track progress; update after each step.
- Keep communication concise; avoid verbose command outputs.
- Use the current directory as the project root; avoid creating extra folders.
- Use the VS Code API tool only for VS Code extension projects.
- Do not install extensions unless explicitly specified.
- Avoid adding media or external links unless requested; use placeholders only when noted.
- Provide clear debug/launch instructions when the project is ready.
- Update this checklist as tasks are completed.
